case_title: WILSON LIANG VS. RUI MING QIU

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIANG, WILSON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT QIU, RUI MING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT WAS THE CAUSE OR CONTRIBUTING FACTOR TO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMED INJURIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-16-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT QIU, RUI MING

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-20-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-20-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. VICKIE YEUNG INTREPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2008 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LIANG, WILSON AS TO DEFENDANT QIU, RUI MING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
